name: mayo-clinic

notes: Rochester, MN. Massive proprietary data assets. Mayo Clinic has a dedicated AI Center of Excellence and Center for Digital Health. Dr. Bradley J. Erickson leads AI/ Informatics research. HUGE opportunity for healthcare AI. HIPAA compliance required. Estimated project scope: $50K-$100K per use case. High-value reference client if landed. CFO Dennis Dahlen confirmed via org page.
